value.body:
## Outcome

Turn local agents into first-class ticket workers: assign them work, monitor progress, review artifacts, intervene when needed, and capture follow-up tasks.

## Scope

- Agent assignment and queue UI
- Run logs, artifacts, input, cancel, retry, and resume controls
- Repository-scoped agent settings and safety policies
- Automation evaluation and suggested ticket actions

## Acceptance criteria

- Agent work is visible, controllable, auditable, and tied back to tickets.
- Existing structured workflow ticket `UKN-7YDK9` remains the foundation for assignment execution.
- Agent failures produce useful handoff state instead of silent dead ends.
value.title: Roadmap: Agent execution and automation
